import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{motion,AnimatePresence}from'framer-motion';import CaseCard from'../components/CaseCard';import LoadingSpinner from'../components/LoadingSpinner';import{casesData}from'../data/cases';import{jsx as _jsx,Fragment as _Fragment,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Home=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();const[cases,setCases]=useState([]);const[filteredCases,setFilteredCases]=useState([]);const[selectedCategory,setSelectedCategory]=useState('all');const[isLoading,setIsLoading]=useState(true);// Имитация загрузки данных (замените на реальный API-запрос)
useEffect(()=>{const timer=setTimeout(()=>{setCases(casesData);setFilteredCases(casesData);setIsLoading(false);},800);// 0.8 сек – эффект загрузки
